assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and Python 3.9+ or Node.js 18+ if measuring the Developer API route.
No Mistral account, Studio activation, or API key exist yet.
No product among Vibe, Studio, or Admin has been preselected by the workshop.

developer_goal: Choose a Mistral product first-success outcome, create a Mistral account, and complete that product's official first-use quickstart.

first_success.outcome: Depends on the unresolved product choice: for the Developer API route, the terminal prints a short model description of Mistral AI.
first_success.observable_signal: For the documented first API request route, the terminal contains the short description rather than an authentication, billing, or rate-limit error.

route_selection.surface: Mistral documentation quickstarts grouped by product
route_selection.rule: Official docs require picking Vibe, Studio, or Admin before a first-mile path exists; do not invent a cross-product winner.

candidates.name: Studio: Activate and generate an API key only
candidates.reason: Official Studio quickstart ends at a working Free-mode API key.

candidates.name: Developer: Send your first API request
candidates.reason: Separate quickstart that prints a chat completion; uses the key guide as a prerequisite.

candidates.name: Vibe Work or Vibe Code first task
candidates.reason: Equal top-level product family with different first-success signals.

candidates.name: Studio playground test without SDK
candidates.reason: Another Studio first-use quickstart with a UI terminal rather than a local terminal print.

required_path.action: Choose the Mistral product and first-use outcome before continuing.
Create or sign in to a Mistral account required by the selected product.
required_path.observable_result: The developer can open Studio or the selected product surface.

required_path.action: If measuring Developer API: open Studio API keys, create a named key, and copy the secret.
required_path.observable_result: A Free-mode API key is stored securely.

required_path.action: If measuring first API request: export MISTRAL_API_KEY, install the SDK, create quickstart code, and run it.
required_path.observable_result: The terminal prints a short description of Mistral AI.

prerequisites.description: Python 3.9+ or Node.js 18+ for the Developer API quickstart.
Studio Free mode is enabled by default with no credit card required for limited API access.

external_gates.description: A Mistral account is required before Studio API keys can be created.
Some API failures return 402 Payment Required when no payment method is on the account.

platform_outcomes.description: Studio issues an API key that is shown only once.
Chat Completions returns model text for a successful authenticated request.

excluded.item: Admin organization, SSO, and workspace administration quickstarts
excluded.reason: Separate product family from Studio/Developer first API use.
Documented as later foundations after the first API request.

sources.title: Platform overview
evidence_supported: Platform overview entry used by source record

sources.title: Activate Studio and generate an API key
Send your first API request
evidence_supported: Chat completion success and error table

sources.title: Test a model in the API playground

uncertainties.question: Which Mistral product and role should the corpus measure for the company-level slug?
uncertainties.impact: It changes the first-success boundary and the complete journey.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: An explicit workshop choice among Vibe, Studio/Developer API, and Admin, with one named first-success quickstart.

uncertainties.question: If Developer API is chosen, does success stop at generating a Free-mode key or at printing the first model response?
uncertainties.impact: These are separate official quickstarts with different terminal outcomes and field counts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A decision between the Activate Studio key guide and Send your first API request as the terminal milestone.

uncertainties.question: What exact Mistral signup fields appear before Studio is available?
uncertainties.impact: Signup controls remain unverified and block a verified account-creation count.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-account signup walkthrough into Studio API Keys.
